noInput: I did not receive a response. I will update the schedule. Take care.
acknowledged: Thank you. Your reminder has been confirmed.
cancelled: Understood. I have marked this reminder as not possible.
rescheduled: Schedule updated. I will call you again later.
medicationIssueNotified: The medication issue will be notified.
medicationTakenOtherTimeAskHhmm: Understood. Enter the time you took it using 4 digits. For example, zero eight thirty for 8:30.
medicationTakenOtherTimeAskMeridiem: If it was before noon, press 1. If it was after noon, press 2.
medicationTakenOtherTimeRecorded: Thank you. I recorded that you took it at a different time.
medicationTakenOtherTimeInvalid: Sorry, I didn't understand the time you said.
introReminderSingular: I am calling for a reminder.
retryAttemptPrefix3: I did not receive a response.
retryGeneric: Please press 1 to confirm, press 2 to indicate it is still pending, or press 3 to indicate it was not possible.
retryMedication: Please press 1 if you have already taken it, press 2 if you have not taken it yet, or press 3 if you cannot take it for any reason.
retryAppointment: Please press 1 to confirm you will attend, or press 2 if you cannot attend.
promptGeneric: Health reminder. Please press 1 to confirm, press 2 to indicate it is still pending, or press 3 to indicate it was not possible.
promptMedicationFuture: Your next dose of {{medicationName}} is{{scheduledAtClause}}. Please press 1 if you have already taken it, press 2 if you will take it at that time, or press 3 if you will not be able to take it for any reason.
promptMedicationDueOrPast: About your {{medicationName}} dose{{scheduledAtClause}}. Have you already taken this medication? Please press 1 if you have already taken it, press 2 if you have not taken it yet, or press 3 if you cannot take it for any reason.
promptAppointmentFuture: Your appointment is{{scheduledAtClause}}. Please press 1 to confirm that you will attend, or press 2 if you will not be able to attend.
promptAppointmentDueOrPast: About your appointment{{scheduledAtClause}}. Please press 1 to confirm that you attended, or press 2 if you could not attend.
